---
name: RFC (Request for Comments)
about: Propose changes to a spec or major architecture decision
title: 'RFC: '
labels: rfc
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

One-paragraph explanation of the proposed change.

## Motivation

What use case is the current spec failing to cover? Concrete example required.

## Detailed design

Code snippets, schema diffs, sequence diagrams. Be specific enough that someone else could implement this from your description.

## Drawbacks

Why might this be a bad idea? Trade-offs you're aware of.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about, and why you didn't pick them.

## Unresolved questions

Open issues this RFC doesn't resolve.

---

**For maintainers**: please leave open ≥7 days for community review before merging the resulting PR.
